category_sources: source_facts.description says it adds GitHub support to git on the command line; official homepage describes hub as an extension to command-line git for GitHub tasks.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hub; official homepage title uses hub.
docs_sources: Official homepage links to full documentation via the hub man page; hub.1.html is the official rendered manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/mislav/hub, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies GitHub and git command-line support; official homepage describes GitHub tasks from the terminal.
